creator: martin@matuska.org
text:
Update of cyrus-imspd from 1.7b to 1.8

Startup script updated to rcNG
Removed file(s): files/imspd.sh
There will probably be no more versions of this software.

Tested with portlint & tinderbox.

Tinderbox log:
http://tinderbox.vx.sk/logs/6.2-FreeBSD-amd64/cyrus-imspd-1.8.log
